title: Show dad all of the documents — fall-2019 Cameron + AirPod + chlorophyll todo
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-September 2019 mega-todo: show dad all of the documents, show confident interaction with Cameron Lewis, finish the "airpod idea", finish elder-tech teaching, do Travis's thank-you / resolution, print things at school, chlorophyll research, Swanson work, "winconsauce do" (Wisconsin/Wisconsauce — likely a FBLA competition or pitch).
  • The line "show dad all of the documents" is the family-translator role at point-blank range — Yahir is curating a paperwork briefing for his father, the precursor to ghostwriting his mother's email in 2021.
  • "Show confident interaction with Cameron Lewis" is the third-mention threshold for Cameron Lewis (1st in Sep 23, 2nd here, 3rd in Oct 8) — confirms the existing stub's promotion track.
  • The "airpod idea" is a single-doc product-fragment with no surfaced follow-through — Yahir was riffing a hardware-affordance idea in the months following AirPod 1's mass-adoption.
  • Chlorophyll research + Swanson work + Wisconsauce = three independent fall-2019 micro-projects that don't surface elsewhere — possibly class-project residue, possibly side-curiosities. Logged for later densify if any recur.

Notes

This note is a load-balancer snapshot — the same plate-loading instinct as the Aug 2019 prep cluster, now in execution mode three weeks into the school year. The "do Travis's thank you, resolution" line places this in the teen era mentor care register: Travis is a mentor figure (see his page) and the "resolution" word suggests Yahir owed him a follow-up after a conflict-mediation conversation — likely the same one that surfaces in 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it.

The "show dad all of the documents" opening is the most quietly significant line. What documents? — almost certainly some combination of: scholarship apps, Mandarin schedule changes, FBLA paperwork, college-prep forms. The framing — show him, not give him — is curatorial, parent-as-audience, the family translator role doing its early work.

The Sep 23-30 stretch is also a high-density week: this note + write scripture for Brenda + feeding the illusion or ending it + post Gtano's for sale on Craigslist. Five days of sustained todo-and-conflict notes.

Cameron Lewis 3rd-mention promotion: this slice combined with prior Wave 1 ingests crosses the densification threshold. The existing cameron lewis stub already lists this summary as a source — keeping the densified-form already in place.

Open questions

  • "Wincons-auce do" — typo for Wisconsin? An FBLA event held in Wisconsin? A nickname for a peer? No surfaced disambiguation.
  • The "airpod idea" — was this a product (case mod, app), a content idea, or a design exercise?
  • "Chlorophyll research" — bio class? side-project? supplements? (The much-later supplement stack note doesn't include chlorophyll.)

Connections

  • 2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda · 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it · 2019 09 28 post gtanos for sale on craigslist — sibling fall-2019 todos
  • 2019 10 08 chinese practice — Cameron Lewis 4th mention, Travis recurring
  • cameron lewis · travis · yahir family · grants pass teen era · fbla
